summary: We are seeking a Senior Backend Engineer to maintain and scale our distributed AI microservices architecture.
roles_and_responsibilities: Design and implement scalable Python backend APIs using FastAPI.
Mentor junior engineers and manage code reviews.

experience_requirements.preferred_background: Experience in FinTech or AI scaling environments highly preferred.

education_requirements.min_degree: B.Sc. in Computer Science or related

summary: Join our AI lab to research and deploy predictive models and foundational NLP tools.
roles_and_responsibilities: Process unstructured text data and design NLP pipelines.
Train, fine-tune, and evaluate deep learning models using PyTorch.
Collaborate with the data engineering team for model deployment.

experience_requirements.preferred_background: Prior experience training models on large text corpora.

education_requirements.min_degree: M.Sc. or Ph.D in Computer Science, Statistics, or similar Data field.
